description: Style Note This season's french connection line features clutches with fantastical bursts of colour in the high street brand's attitudinal style. Add to this potent mix a simplistic design and minimalistic hardware and we have this lust-worthy piece, perfect to add that refined facelift  to your season wardrobe. Product Details Brown glitter cluth with a flap with a press button closure and a buckle design Has a main compartment  One long removable shoulder handle in metal Material and Care Shell: 50% polyurethane and 50% polyethylene and lining: 100% polyester Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Size Height: 10 cm Width: 14 cm Depth: 4 cm
